figures.caption: FIG. 2. Test accuracies of the Fashion-MNIST dataset given by TACNN (red) and comparable CNN (blue) with one convolution layer for varying kernel count 2m, where m = 0, 1, . . . , 11. For TACNN with two convolution layers (orange) the kernel counts of the second layer are 16×16, 32×32 and 64×64. Comparison with very deep CNNs VGG-16 (green) and GoogLeNet (purple) given by Ref. [25] further demonstrates the supremacy of TACNN in terms of parameter efficiency.
